char_status: Former 狩灵协会2科 member, Wanted 罪灵

appearance.hair: Long black hair, unkempt, reaches lower back
appearance.face: Covered from head to toe with gray-white bandages.
appearance.clothing: Long black trench coat with golden buttons, black belt, black crewneck sweater underneath.

char_background.origin: Former 灵力回路: releasing 灵力 flames, in her third year in 狩灵协会2科, a 灾厄级 恶灵 annihilated her entire squad during a mission; she alone survived. 灵力 exhaustion and grief overloaded her 灵力回路; it mutated, eroded her body, and became 余烬.

char_special_abilities.灵力回路-余烬: Mutual conversion between flesh and ash, converts herself into ash to construct weapons or shape constructs. When she or her constructs touch something containing 灵力, it turns to ash and is absorbed, sustaining her crumbling body.

char_relationships.狩灵协会: Former workplace, no longer holds any loyalty toward them. Would walk past a dying 狩灵 without slowing.
char_relationships.Fallen squad: The only people she trusted. Rebuilds their silhouettes with ash.
